description: Add ordered site-gateway model fallback chains with attempt logging, while keeping audit logging and minute-level summaries intact, then prove it with tests.

userStories.title: Persist gateway request audit events
userStories.description: As an operator, I need every gateway request to leave a durable audit event so I can trace site, token, model, status, and latency even when One API is not in the execution path.
acceptanceCriteria: site-gateway writes one durable event for every POST request, including both success and handled failure paths
event fields include trace_id, site_name, masked token identity, request kind, requested/upstream model, upstream name, status_code, error_code, and duration_ms
chat responses store usage totals when the upstream returns usage
image responses store returned item count when the upstream returns a data array
Tests fail first and then pass

userStories.title: Support minute-level and dimension summaries
userStories.description: As an operator, I need recomputable summaries by minute, site, token, and model from the same audit truth so I can answer traffic questions without relying on the One API panel.
acceptanceCriteria: SQLite-backed audit store can return total counts and per-minute counts for a recent window
SQLite-backed audit store can summarize by site_name, token identity, and request_model
Summary output includes request counts, success counts, failure counts, total tokens when available, and image counts when available
Tests fail first and then pass

userStories.title: Expose a minimal audit reader
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a simple local command to read recent events and summaries from the audit store so I can inspect traffic without touching the database manually.
acceptanceCriteria: Repository includes a small read script for recent rows, minute counts, and grouped summaries
Docker and env defaults point site-gateway at a persistent audit database path
Full project test suite passes after the change

userStories.title: Support ordered chat and image model chains
userStories.description: As an operator, I need each site token to express an ordered chat chain and image chain so requests can default to the first preferred Gemini model and fall back in a fixed order only when the upstream failure is retriable.
acceptanceCriteria: Gateway config supports ordered chat and image model candidate lists per site
If request JSON explicitly includes model, that explicit model remains highest priority and no default chain is used
If request JSON omits model, chat and image requests follow the configured ordered model chain
Retriable upstream failures can advance to the next model in the chain, while non-retriable failures stop immediately
Tests fail first and then pass
userStories.notes: 已实现 chat_model_candidates / image_model_candidates；显式 model 优先，默认链顺序回退只在可重试失败时继续。

userStories.title: Print and audit fallback attempt logs
userStories.description: As an operator, I need the gateway to print which models were tried for each request and preserve the attempt chain in audit data so I can verify whether a site token really used a Gemini 3 model or fell back to an older one.
acceptanceCriteria: Gateway prints a structured try/fail/success attempt log per request trace
Audit data stores the ordered attempted models and final selected model
Recent audit reads include the attempt chain for troubleshooting
Full project test suite passes after the change
userStories.notes: 已打印结构化尝试日志，并把 attempted_models 落入审计，recent 查询可直接读取。
